creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I've got this sound card:

hdac0@pci0:0:20:2:      class=0x040300 card=0x30c2103c chip=0x43831002 rev=0x00
hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'ATI Technologies Inc. / Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.'
    device     = 'IXP SB600 High Definition Audio Controller'
    class      = multimedia
    subclass   = HDA

On boot I get:

hdac0: <ATI SB600 High Definition Audio Controller> irq 16 at device 20.2 on pci
0
hdac0: HDA Driver Revision: 20100226_0142
hdac0: hdac_get_capabilities: Invalid corb size (0)
device_attach: hdac0 attach returned 6

This has been discussed at:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2010-July/018733.html
